title: Tick Icon in Item Field
excerpt: Hi all, Does anyone know what this tick is and how I use that feature / function?

posts.author: Castlegate (Elaine Newbold)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, Does anyone know what this tick is and how I use that feature / function?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Castlegate

Welcome to the community. That tick icon appears if there is an update in the item that contains a checklist.

image1309×262 31.9 KB

The little circle around the icon will slowly get green when more items in the checkbox update are ticked off.

posts.author: Castlegate (Elaine Newbold)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much for your reply, much appreciated
